mechanism_narrative: Sustained levels of the federal funds rate directly increase the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points over a rolling three-month window signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite the unemployment acceleration signal.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of rising consumer price inflation and declining real consumer credit outstanding indicates tightening financial conditions amid persistent price pressures, which compresses equity risk premiums and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are not significantly lower when CPIAUCSL and RSAFS diverge in the specified direction simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month expansion in industrial production directly reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates into near-term positive earnings revisions and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth shows no predictive power for 5-day forward returns during recovery phases, with Rank IC < 0.02 over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: A breakdown in housing starts below 1.1 million annualized units signals a sharp contraction in residential investment and consumer confidence, which precedes broader demand weakness and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX does not decline following sustained housing starts below the 1.1 million threshold, or forward returns remain positive.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous acceleration in nonfarm payrolls and real GDP growth confirms broad-based economic expansion, which drives upward earnings revisions and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns do not outperform when both PAYEMS and GDPC1 show concurrent acceleration, or Rank IC drops below 0.04.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained elevation in the consumer price index increases input costs and forces monetary policy accommodation, which erodes corporate profit margins and compresses equity valuations, yielding negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL levels show no negative correlation with 60-day forward equity returns across multiple economic cycles.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in real consumer credit outstanding reflects robust household borrowing and spending capacity, which directly supports near-term corporate revenues and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS growth fails to predict 5-day forward returns during early recovery phases, or signal direction flips consistently.
